messages.content: Help me study vocabulary: write a sentence for me to fill in the blank, and I'll try to pick the correct option.

Great! Let’s start with an upper-intermediate level word.

Here is the sentence:

**"The ending of the movie was entirely \_\_\_\_\_\_\_; the director left it open to interpretation so that the audience could decide for themselves what happened to the main character."**

A) explicit
B) ambiguous
C) coherent
D) candid

**Which option fits best?**
